summary: Built the accepted 3-slice plan. SLICE A (unattended /gogo:done bash-safety): rewrote the two gogo-done delete sites to a guarded scoped-find idiom — the changelog-assembly refresh (gogo-done/SKILL.md) now guards $dst non-empty AND under .gogo/changelog/ then uses `find $dst -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.mmd' -delete` + a scoped before/ clean (no glob-rm, no `rm -rf $var`); the board stale-file cleanup replaced `rm -f "$res" "$code"` with `find .gogo/resources/kanban -maxdepth 1 -type f ( -name board-intent.json -o -name board-exit.code ) -delete`. Lightly hardened the two gogo-build migration sites (guard $legacy non-empty; find-based deletes already scoped) with explanatory comments. Added the regression lint cli/skills_lint_test.go (TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm) — command-anchored regexes that flag glob-rm / rm-on-a-bare-variable across skills/*/SKILL.md and never trip on prose. Verified the rewritten idiom in a scratch harness: refresh works, empty date/name refuses with a nonzero exit, files outside .gogo survive, idempotent. SLICE B (waiting-for-input signal): added contract.Feature.WaitingForInput() (union of awaiting-plan-acceptance + waiting-for-user + awaiting-uat); surfaced it in three read-only display sites — renderCard's leading ⏸ cue (cardBadgeText + badgeStyleFor accent, shown focused+unfocused; awaiting-plan-acceptance now also carries the wait accent and surfaces its state name in badge()), gogo status' dedicated leading WAIT column (waitMarker), and viewBoard's │ column separators (interleaveSeparators/columnSeparator + sepStyle), with boardColWidth re-derived for the 3 gutters. Flipped the feature-ready fixture done→awaiting-uat (keeps its ready-to-ship class) and regenerated status.golden. SLICE C (board accept action): added launch.ActionAccept (BuildIntent → /gogo:accept <slug> + gogo-accept-<slug> session; added to SessionMatchesSlug's walk), routed move.go attemptAction's ClassUnfinished case to ActionAccept when status==awaiting-plan-acceptance (else ActionGo — branching on status not class, closing the dead end), and added the thin commands/accept.md + skills/gogo-accept/SKILL.md (present-then-record, reusing gogo-plan's single-owner plan-accepted recording; accept-only, CLI never mutates state). Enumeration-sync + version 0.13.0→0.14.0 (plugin.json + cli/main.go Version + printHelp board-keys); commands 12→13 across docs/commands.md, docs/architecture.md, README, project-knowledge.md; additive-presentation notes in docs/cli-contract.md §Changed-in-0.14.0. As-built charts/ reconciled to concrete symbols; manifest validated (kinds in schema enum). GATES: gofmt -l clean, go vet clean, go test -race ./... green (new tests: TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm, TestWaitingForInput, TestWaitingCardCue, TestBadgeAwaitingPlanAcceptance, TestColumnSeparatorRendered, TestBuildIntentAccept, TestAcceptMoveGuard, TestAcceptSessionAttribution); binary builds, `gogo --version`=0.14.0, `gogo status` renders the WAIT column on the real tree.
